# Copilot Instructions

- Project type: Vite, TypeScript, and Three.js first-person puzzle prototype.
- Keep gameplay code modular: board rules in systems, rendering in world, browser UI in ui.
- Prefer small focused changes that preserve the scaffold's playable prototype shape.
- Run `npm run build` before considering implementation work complete.

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
